method: Every MOS entry in the manual carries a rank range (e.g. 'Sgt to Pvt'). The BOTTOM rank is the structural answer: an MOS a Private can hold is awarded at an entry-level school; one that bottoms out above Private requires you to already be serving. FAIL CLOSED on any MOS absent from the manual.

jobs.code: CODE STATUS: UNVERIFIED-CURRENT. Historically MOS 4341 Combat Correspondent — still referenced as the MOS awarded by DINFOS's Combat Correspondent Course per DINFOS's own training-department page (secondary-corroborated 2026-07-12). Administratively, the Marine Corps merged the legacy 43XX (Public Affairs) and 46XX (Combat Camera) fields into a new 45XX (Communication Strategy and Operations) occupational field per MARADMIN 484/17 (30 Aug 2017) and MARADMIN 534/17 (28 Sep 2017). A third-party MOS aggregator (mosroadmap.com) lists a '4531 Combat Mass Communicator' code within the 45XX field that may be 4341's current successor, but this was NOT confirmed against a primary Marine Corps MOS manual this session — presented with both the legacy designation and the known successor field, not guessed.
